use clap::Parser;
use std::fmt;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, env = "API_TOKEN")]
    api_token: SecretString,

    #[arg(long, env = "DATABASE_PASSWORD")]
    database_password: SecretString,

    #[arg(long)]
    host: String,
}

struct SecretString(String);

impl fmt::Debug for SecretString {
    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
        write!(f, "[REDACTED]")
    }
}

impl fmt::Display for SecretString {
    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
        write!(f, "[REDACTED]")
    }
}

fn main() {
    let cli = Cli::parse();
    println!("connecting to {} with token {:?}", cli.host, cli.api_token);
}
